title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API that generates customer email replies in the user's voice. The tool was developed by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager without prior coding experience, using Claude Code to automate administrative work for sales representatives.
